title: Pediatric Developmental Assessment * Autism Spectrum Disorder - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Health Care > Pediatric Developmental Assessment * Autism Spectrum Disorder 2 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Autism Spectrum Disorder Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF NORTHWEST REGIONAL EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT AUTISM SPECTRUM DISORDER PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides licensed special education teachers with specific teaching experience, training, and knowledge in the area of Autism Spectrum Disorder (ASD). These services support districts as they work to build the capacity of their special education teams. Examples of this work include developing staff knowledge of the characteristics of ASD, classroom-based strategies, evidence-based practices (EBPs), and assessment requirements and procedures. 5825 NE Ray Circle Hillsboro, OR 97124 Eligibility: Ages 5-21, medical or health assessment is required as part of the educational eligibility process Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4:30pm Email (503) 614-1310 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NORTHWEST REGIONAL EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT NORTHWEST REGIONAL EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT CLATSOP SERVICE CENTER AUTISM SPECTRUM DISORDER PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides licensed special education teachers with specific teaching experience, training, and knowledge in the area of Autism Spectrum Disorder (ASD). These services support districts as they work to build the capacity of their special education teams.
